data.title: CPSC Posts Product Recalls and Product Safety Warnings to its Web Site
data.description: Today, the CPSC disclosed a recall of over one million Cuisinart Grill Brushes by Conair due to an ingestion hazard. This recall was conducted in collaboration with the involved firms and can be accessed at www.cpsc.gov. The exact number of units affected was not specified in the provided information.

Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Small Business Bank and announces termination enforcement actions with BNP Paribas S.A., BNP Paribas USA, Inc., BNP Paribas Securities Corp., and Community Bankshares, Inc.

data.title: Blake Investment Partners and Related Group’s Historic Gas Plant Bid Selected by City of St. Petersburg
data.description: St. Petersburg, Florida has chosen Blake Investment Partners and Related Group alongside their team to revamp the Historic Gas Plant District, marking one of the biggest redevelopment projects in the city’s past. Mayor Welch expressed gratitude for the opportunity, emphasizing the historical significance of the district. This initiative is expected to involve a substantial investment and collaboration between local and national partners, promising significant economic impact and transformation for the area.
FTSE 100 INDEX INCREASES BY 2% TO 10,688.06.

data.title: IQM Quantum Computers Becomes First European Quantum Computing Company Listed on a Major U.S. Exchange
data.description: IQM Quantum Computers, a global leader in full-stack superconducting quantum computers, has officially become a publicly traded company after finalizing a business merger with Real Asset Acquisition Corp. The company, now listed on the Nasdaq Global Select Market under the ticker symbol “IQMX”, marks a significant milestone in its journey. IQM Quantum Computers' American Depositary Shares are now available for trading, showcasing the company's growth and expansion.
PAKISTAN FINANCE MINISTRY: PAKISTAN FINANCE MINISTER MEETS SP GLOBAL RATINGS DELEGATION

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Nuvei/
data.description: Nuvei has successfully finalized the first-party in-agent payment process with Visa, marking a significant milestone in their partnership. This development was announced on 02-Jul-2023. The company has revealed their innovative agentic payments strategy, led by merchants themselves. The revised information was provided directly by Nuvei without specifying the source.

data.title: HGreg Wins the Canadian Business Excellence Award for the Fourth Consecutive Year
data.description: HGreg, based in Montreal, has been named a recipient of the 2026 Canadian Business Excellence Awards for private businesses. Given by Excellence Canada, this award acknowledges companies that excel in customer service, employee engagement, and organizational innovation. This achievement represents HGreg's fourth consecutive year winning the award. The recognition is particularly meaningful in the rapidly evolving automotive industry where customer demands are at an all-time high.

data.title: This July Regal and Nathan's Famous Are Serving Up a Hot Dog Summer with Big Rewards
data.description: July 2, 2026 - Knoxville, Tenn. - Regal announces Hot Dog Summer in July, offering quarter pound Nathan's Famous hot dogs with Heinz condiments at all concession stands. Running from July 1 to August 2, Regal Crown Club members can relish this upgraded hot dog experience.

data.title: TIMEX GROUP TAKES FULL OWNERSHIP OF DANIEL WELLINGTON
data.description: Timex Group has reached a significant milestone in their dedication to advancing the global watch and jewelry brand industry by finalizing the acquisition of Daniel Wellington on July 2, 2026. This strategic move reinforces their commitment to growth and innovation. Daniel Wellington, a well-known brand in the industry, is now fully under the Timex Group umbrella, signifying a major development in the market. This acquisition marks a key moment for Timex Group as they continue to expand their presence, with this high-profile purchase solidifying their position in the watch and jewelry sector.

data.title: Angel Founders Transfer More Than 10 Million Super-Voting Shares to Angel Mission Trust to Preserve Company’s Mission for Generations
data.description: ROVO, Utah-- Angel (NYSE: ANGX), a media and technology company, is introducing an audience-driven studio model where Angel Guild members participate in selecting films and TV series for distribution. Co-Founders Neal Harmon and Jeffrey Harmon have transferred over 10 million shares of super-voting class B Angel stock to the Angel Mission Trust. This move signifies a significant shift in ownership within the company and reflects their commitment to the Angel Guild community.

data.title: FBI Director Kash Patel didn't reveal buying stock in Bitcoin company Strategy, which has dropped by 44% since November.
data.description: The FBI Director, Kash Patel, did not disclose a substantial stock purchase in the Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy in November.

data.title: In HelloNation, Dental Expert Dr. Norman D. Knowles Discusses the Role of Digital Planning in Modern Dental Implants
data.description: An article explores the significance of digital tools in aiding implant planning, restoration design, and ensuring the success of long-term treatments. Recently released on July 2, 2026 from VERO BEACH, Fla., the insights delve into the essence of digital planning for dental implants. The publication by HelloNation sheds light on the pivotal role played by digital technologies in dental practices.

data.title: Stolt-Nielsen Limited to Host a Video Conference to Present the Results for the Second Quarter and First Half of 2026
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Stolt-Nielsen Limited (Oslo Børs: SNI) announced a virtual presentation to review its unaudited results for the second quarter and first half of 2026. The event is scheduled for Thursday, July 9, 2026, at 15:00 CEST (09:00 EDT, 14:00 BST). This presentation will cover important financial data and performance metrics for the company.

data.title: Tech hiring momentum continues as tech occupations and new job postings increase, CompTIA analysis reveals
data.description: The unemployment rate for tech occupations has dropped to 2.9%. In the town of Downers Grove, Illinois, as of July 2, 2026, there has been a positive trend in technology employment with an increase in new tech job postings for the sixth month in a row. This data suggests a strong demand for technology skills in the industry.

data.title: Radnostix Acquires Lucerno Dynamics Assets Expanding Radiopharma Medical Device Portfolio
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Radnostix, Inc. (OTCQB: INIS) based in Idaho Falls, completed the acquisition of important assets from Lucerno Dynamics, LLC. Radnostix is a top player in radioisotope production and nuclear medicine solutions. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for the company's growth strategy.

data.title: Boxlight Symphony and Symphonic Series Earn Four Tech & Learning Best of Show Awards at ISTE 2026
data.description: In Duluth, Georgia, Boxlight Corporation (Nasdaq: BOXL) recently revealed that their Symphony platform and Symphonic Series received four prestigious Tech & Learning Best of Show Awards during ISTE 2026. The awards spanned across Primary Education and Secondary Education sectors, acknowledging the advancements in campus communication and school safety solutions. This recognition highlights the impact of Boxlight's innovative technology in the education field, underscoring their commitment to enhancing learning environments.

data.title: Global DNA Diagnostics Market is Expected to Showcase a Significant Growth at a CAGR of ~7% by 2034 | DelveInsight
data.description: The DNA diagnostics industry is seeing strong growth due to a rise in genetic disorders, infectious diseases, and cancer cases globally. The demand for advanced molecular diagnostic services is on the rise due to the increasing prevalence of these health conditions. The market is boosted by the growing adoption of precision medicine and personalized healthcare. This trend has led to significant growth in the industry, with market revenues reaching a notable figure and showing no signs of slowing down.

China on Thursday successfully launched a new marine satellite into orbit from the Jiuquan Satellite Launch Center in northwest China. The launch captured a stunning visual moment as the rocket framed beautifully against the backdrop of the Moon.

data.title: Skip the Summer Crowds: Tripmasters Reveals Europe's Best Fall Escapes
data.description: Tripmasters is showcasing the top destinations to explore in Europe this autumn, featuring vineyard harvests, picturesque mountain foliage, renowned festivals, and rich culinary customs. In Silver Spring, Maryland, news on July 2, 2026, reveals this exciting opportunity for travelers looking to immerse themselves in Europe's wonders during the season.
